detectors.description:
Reentrancy in L1Vault.resolveChallenge(bytes32,bool) (src/L1Vault.sol#682-720):
	External calls:
	- _resolveValidChallenge(lockId,challengeData,lockData,request) (src/L1Vault.sol#697)
		- (success,None) = challengeData.challenger.call{value: challengeData.bond + challengerReward}() (src/L1Vault.sol#731)
		- (refundSuccess,None) = lockData.sender.call{value: lockData.amount}() (src/L1Vault.sol#737)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- insuranceFund += request.bond (src/L1Vault.sol#705)
	L1Vault.insuranceFund (src/L1Vault.sol#239) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- L1Vault.insuranceFund (src/L1Vault.sol#239)
	- request.bond = 0 (src/L1Vault.sol#706)
	L1Vault.unlockRequests (src/L1Vault.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- L1Vault.checkProverTimeout(bytes32) (src/L1Vault.sol#436-460)
	- L1Vault.getUnlockRequest(bytes32) (src/L1Vault.sol#927)
	- L1Vault.recordProverRequest(bytes32) (src/L1Vault.sol#516-524)
	- L1Vault.unlockRequests (src/L1Vault.sol#235)

Reentrancy in [L1Vault.resolveChallenge(bytes32,bool)](src/L1Vault.sol#L682-L720):
	External calls:
	- [_resolveValidChallenge(lockId,challengeData,lockData,request)](src/L1Vault.sol#L697)
		- [(success,None) = challengeData.challenger.call{value: challengeData.bond + challengerReward}()](src/L1Vault.sol#L731)
		- [(refundSuccess,None) = lockData.sender.call{value: lockData.amount}()](src/L1Vault.sol#L737)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [insuranceFund += request.bond](src/L1Vault.sol#L705)
	[L1Vault.insuranceFund](src/L1Vault.sol#L239) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [L1Vault.insuranceFund](src/L1Vault.sol#L239)
	- [request.bond = 0](src/L1Vault.sol#L706)
	[L1Vault.unlockRequests](src/L1Vault.sol#L235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [L1Vault.checkProverTimeout(bytes32)](src/L1Vault.sol#L436-L460)
	- [L1Vault.getUnlockRequest(bytes32)](src/L1Vault.sol#L927)
	- [L1Vault.recordProverRequest(bytes32)](src/L1Vault.sol#L516-L524)
	- [L1Vault.unlockRequests](src/L1Vault.sol#L235)

	- newY = (2 * x + 3 * y) % 5 (src/libraries/SHA3_256.sol#259)
